---
title: "Introduction to writer"
author: "Nicolas Mangin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette Title}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


I designed the package *writer* to help researchers write articles for submission to various academic journal in the fields of accounting, finance, and management.
